title: Rappenem's Reforge
description: A silly pixel artist's reimagining of Minecraft's visuals!
body:
![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/tCsPgH8k/Rappenem-s-Reforge-Banner-Sunset.png)
# Description

Rappenem's Reforge is a resource pack that aims to give the game's assets a **fresh new coat of paint**, while still maintaining that **classic and playful Minecraft feel**! The new sprites remain faithful to vanilla's base resolutions, but with greatly expanded color palettes, more detail and improved designs that have a slight medieval/fantasy vibe!

# Links & info!

### ⚠️ The following mods are needed in order to have access to all of pack's features! ⚠️
### 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/)

[Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)

[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)


</details>

If you'd like to follow along with the pack's progress and join a community of cool artists along the way, join my [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/2hvKFfPzQt)!
_It's also where you can go if you're having any technical issues with the pack._

## I'm also working on a Bedrock port of the pack _(PC/mobile)_ over on my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/posts/rappenems-port-156065827), where you can also get early access, bonus content and more!![PBR diamond blocks](https://i.gyazo.com/d9c6987ff279961b2887ccc21d54dd3b.png)

[![FF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe2313e6ca2c3df47d179aa09bbc4c57799f6094.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Rappenem)
[![D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95be1badf0f5131587308606c53801d55223882c.png)](https://discord.com/invite/2hvKFfPzQt)[![F](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77276c296d994e962ff04b57a57206c7abf516de.png)](https://www.instagram.com/rappenems_reforge/)[![H](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24c2ce58d5be6a91a8fb4e14aee09b885f105ad5.png)](https://x.com/Rapps_Reforge)

# Contents

### Freshly redesigned UI with far more detail & personality!

![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/hGg6jV5S/Mob-Effects-Presentation.gif)

### Over 200 resprited items!

![Image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1244413/description_9e541f28-aa4c-41b3-9029-c8793edad98f.gif)
